example: Fashion trends can vary greatly depending on the region and culture.
Some cultures have traditional clothing that holds significant cultural value.
She decided to wear a white blouse and a black skirt for the job interview.
He rolled up the hem of his shorts for a more fashionable look.
He kept his keys in the pocket of his jeans.
He carefully fastened the buttons on his shirt.
The employees at the hotel wear a professional uniform.
I always carry an umbrella in my bag in case it rains.
A belt can be both a practical and stylish accessory for jeans or dresses.
He wears his watch every day, even when he goes swimming.
He cleans his glasses regularly to keep them smudge-free.
He forgot to bring his sunglasses to the beach, and his eyes got sunburned.
Her briefcase had a combination lock for added security.
During the winter, he always wears a warm woolen cap to keep his head cozy.
He bought a gold bracelet with a delicate design for his wife.
He reached into his back pocket and pulled out his wallet.
A friend admired her chain and asked where she bought it.
He surprised her with a set of elegant pearl earrings on her birthday.
He bought a silver ring with a blue gemstone for his mother's birthday.
He gifted her a silver necklace with a star-shaped charm.
He bought a lovely piece of jewelry for his mother's birthday.
He bought a new bottle of his favorite perfume as a gift for his girlfriend.
After losing weight, his pants became loose and he needed a smaller size.
His shoes were too tight, and they gave him blisters.
Can you try on these shoes to see if they fit?
Can I try these sunglasses on to see how they look on me?
I always put on my helmet before riding my bike.
After a long day at work, I like to take off my high heels.
After getting wet in the rain, they went home to change into dry clothes.
He donated his worn-out clothes to a local charity.
He tightened his belt before heading out for a run.
